nasb.text: all the oxen for the burnt offering twelve bulls, all the rams twelve, the male lambs one year old with their grain offering twelve, and the male goats for a sin offering twelve;

esv.text: all the cattle for the burnt offering twelve bulls, twelve rams, twelve male lambs a year old, with their grain offering; and twelve male goats for a sin offering;

cnv.text: 作燔祭的牲畜，共有公牛犢十二頭、公綿羊十二隻、一歲的公羊羔十二隻，還有同獻的素祭，以及作贖罪祭的公山羊十二隻；

ccb.text: 作燔祭的牲畜共有公牛犊、公绵羊、一岁的公羊羔各十二只，还有一起献上的素祭以及作赎罪祭的公山羊十二只；
